name: Samly's Merge
short_description: Easy to learn, hard to master. No time limits. No rush. Just relax and merge in pixel-art goodness.
detailed_description:
Easy to learn, hard to master. No time limits. No rush. Just relax and merge in pixel-art goodness.

Easy To Learn

Join 3 tokens of the same tier to merge them and create the next tier.

No Time Limits, No Rush

Play at your own pace, with no time restrictions. Pause or leave the game whenever you want a break, and continue at your leisure.

Pixel Art Goodness

Enjoy cute 16-bit pixel art graphics. Customise everything from the tokens to the UI theme to suit your tastes.

Achievements & Leaderboards

Collect a range of achievements and compete with both friends and the world for top spot on the leaderboards.

Hard To Master

Do you have what is takes to merge the highest tier of token and win a game?
